task_completion.description: Navigate to the FreeScout system-wide mail settings page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the FreeScout settings interface, specifically the 'Mail' or 'Email' settings tab/section.

task_completion.description: Set the Mail Driver to SMTP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Mail Driver' (or similar) dropdown or selection is set to 'SMTP'.

task_completion.description: Configure the SMTP Host and Port.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'SMTP Host' field contains exactly '127.0.0.1' and the 'SMTP Port' field contains exactly '1025'.

task_completion.description: Configure Encryption to None and leave authentication fields empty.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Encryption' dropdown is set to 'None' (or empty/unselected if applicable), and both the 'Username' and 'Password' input fields are completely blank.

task_completion.description: Configure the From Email and From Name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'From Email' field contains 'notifications@helpdesk.local' and the 'From Name' field contains 'Internal Helpdesk'.
A success message indicating settings were saved (e.g., 'Settings saved') is visible, or the settings are shown as saved/persisted in the final screenshot.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeScout web interface to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the FreeScout web UI in a browser, not terminal commands or text editors modifying `.env` files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual FreeScout application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the FreeScout URL and the interface matches the FreeScout application, not a static HTML mock or text document.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to alter the page visually.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (like the Elements or Console tabs) are not open in the screenshots where the final settings are displayed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring FreeScout email relay. Verify the following exact values in the Mail Settings UI: Mail Driver is 'smtp' or 'SMTP', Host is '127.0.0.1', Port is '1025', Encryption is 'None' (or unselected), From Email is 'notifications@helpdesk.local', From Name is 'Internal Helpdesk', and Username/Password fields are empty. These values match the locally-running mock SMTP server setup.
